creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
I did try that with no change.  zim --index --flush Notebooks/Notes/
 results in the same error report as you got, but after that I continue to get the whole error trace dump.  I decided to report this as a bug because it was happening even on a completely fresh install of FreeBSD, with absolutely no previous data - the disk had been zeroed with dd.  And only the barest minimum of software was installed.

What version of sqlite do you have?
